title: Config
description: Repo wiring: environments, change classes, and fact providers (ADR-0010 config.yaml). Safety-bearing: unknown fields/enum values reject at every level (ADR-0017 §9).

environments.description: Environment classifier; last match wins as the documented default (ADR-0010).

classes.description: Change-class classifier; MergePolicy packs are routed to classes via RulesetBinding.

providers.description: Keyed by provider name (surfaced to rules as facts.<name>.*, ADR-0004).

paths.description: Glob patterns against repo-relative file paths.

type.description: Provider implementation identifier (e.g. builtin/gitlab-groups, http, exec).

failure.description: closed (default) demotes an unresolved fact to fail-safe (ADR-0004); a controlling/authorization provider may never be configured open (lint hard error, docs/planning/lint-hard-errors.md).
